title: Manufacturing Engineer - Rahu Catalysts - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Rahu Catalysts - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Rahu Catalysts has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Rahu Catalysts:
Rahu Catalysts is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rahu Catalysts!
